name: Research Columbus neighborhoods for buying
desc: Westerville, Clintonville, German Village, Short North, Worthington. Compare schools, commute, walkability, price per sqft.

name: Understand mortgage pre-approval process
desc: Talk to Buckeye FCU about pre-approval. Need ~20% down. Current savings $14,500 - need to grow to ~$40-50k for target price range.

name: Figure out down payment savings timeline
desc: At current savings rate (~$400/mo surplus after expenses), rough timeline to $45k down: 4-5 years unless salary increases.

name: Look into first-time homebuyer programs Ohio
desc: Ohio Housing Finance Agency (OHFA). Check income limits, grants, reduced rate programs for first-time buyers.

name: Tour open houses in Westerville
desc: Westerville is close to current apartment - familiar area. Look for 2br/1ba condos or small homes under $250k.

name: Find a buyer's agent
desc: Ask Rachel or Chloe for referrals. Research agents specializing in Columbus/Westerville area.

name: Research property tax rates by Columbus suburb
desc: Franklin County vs Delaware County. Westerville spans both. Important for total monthly cost calculation.

name: Decide: condo vs house
desc: Pros/cons list done. Leaning toward condo first - lower maintenance, better fit for solo living. Revisit in 2027.

name: Target price range: $200k-$260k
desc: Based on income ($68k), debt load (car payment, no student loans remaining), and monthly budget headroom. Confirmed with online calculators.

name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 upgrade
desc: Current one is 6qt. Want the 8qt for batch cooking. Check for Black Friday or Prime Day deals.

name: All-Clad D3 stainless skillet (12-inch)
desc: Seen at Nordstrom Rack occasionally. Also on Amazon. Compare prices - usually ~$90-120.

name: Dutch oven (Le Creuset or Lodge)
desc: For stews, sourdough bread, braises. Le Creuset is beautiful but pricey. Lodge cast iron dutch oven is solid at ~$60.

name: OXO salad spinner
desc: Current spinner is a cheap one that wobbles. OXO gets great reviews. Like $30 on Amazon.

name: Better chef's knife
desc: Want a 8-inch Victorinox Fibrox or Wusthof Classic. Victorinox ~$45, Wusthof ~$130. Probably start with Victorinox.

name: Sheet pan set (half-sheet aluminum)
desc: Nordic Ware natural aluminum half sheets - 2-pack ~$25 on Amazon. Needed for my sheet pan dinners.

name: Spice rack organizer
desc: Cabinet is a disaster. Tiered shelf inserts or a magnetic wall-mounted rack. Measure cabinet depth first.

name: Microplane grater / zester
desc: Mine broke. Classic Microplane from Target or Amazon. ~$15.

name: Nordic Ware half-sheet pans (2-pack)
desc: Ordered from Amazon. Arrived in great shape - non-warping, easy clean.

name: OXO Good Grips can opener
desc: Replaced old one. Target, $12. Works perfectly.

name: Airtight pantry containers (Rubbermaid)
desc: Set of 10 from Target. For flour, oats, rice, pasta, lentils. Keeps pantry organized.
